title: MYCO MX-100 Scale 100g 0.01g Digital Pocket Mini Scales
features: POCKET SIZED: Perfect lightweight weighing scales for weights up to 100g to an accuracy of 0.01g
BACKLIT DISPLAY: Clearly see weights via the digital LCD backlit display. Has 4 modes ideal for jewellers and metalsmiths such as gram, DWT (penny weight), grain and carat
INCLUDES TRAY: Features a protective cover that also acts as a weighing tray
PACKED WITH FEATURES: Includes auto-off feature, overload protection, TARE/ZERO and one touch calibration
description: The On Balance MX-100 Myco Digital miniscale will weigh up to 100g to an accuracy of 0.01g. Allows the user to weigh in four measurements including grams, DWT pennyweight, carat and grain. This handy, compact pocket-sized scale features a sturdy plastic cover to help prevent the weighing sensor from damage whilst being transported around. The cover can also be used as an expansion tray. Featuring a green back-lit LCD display, results are easy-to-read in any lighting conditions. Also features built-in overload protection to help prevent damage to the scale. Other features include TARE/ZERO one touch calibration and a battery saving power off after 3 minutes of inactivity. Includes 2x AAA batteries and user manual.
